vulnerabilities.description: The XML parser resolves external entities. Submitting a payload with a DOCTYPE and a file:// entity (e.g., <!DOCTYPE foo [ <!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/hostname"> ]>) resulted in the server returning the contents of /etc/hostname in the response, confirming XXE-based local file read and indicating potential SSRF/file exfiltration risk.

User-supplied XML is echoed back into the HTML response without escaping. Including <script>alert('xss')</script> inside the <Title> element was reflected unescaped in the response body, which would execute in a browser context.
